description: Multiple buffer overflows in (1) CxAce60.dll and (2) CxAce60u.dll in SpeedProject Squeez 5.10 Build 4460, and SpeedCommander 10.52 Build 4450 and 11.01 Build 4450, allow user-assisted remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via an ACE archive that contains a file with a long filename.
